race.comment: SILENT LEGACY (7) has hit the line nicely in his two runs back and should be hitting his straps now third-up. The 1400m looks perfect for him and looks clearly the one to beat. WINNING ALL ROUND (8) is a Zousain gelding on debut for the Bain & Taylor partnership. Has come along nicely in her two trials and is drawn favourably. Can make a bright start. ALPINE LEE (10) got too far back here when resuming but warmed up nicely late. Better for that and should relish the extra 200m from a kinder draw. Can give this a big shake. Similar story for PAGANINI (3) who finished alongside ALPINE LEE. Has had more chances than AL, so that's the slight lean.
